bio: Software Engineer specialized in .NET, React and TypeScript, with experience in systems processing millions of daily requests. I have worked on data-driven marketing, LGPD/GDPR compliance and AI-powered workflow automation. I work with cloud (AWS, Azure), containers, messaging and relational and non-relational databases.
educationPostgrad: Postgraduate in Distributed Software Architecture, PUC Minas | 2025 - 2026
